prompt_order.title: LIVE_CUTOVER_RECEIPT_PIPELINE_ANCHORIZATION-0
human_review_requirements: receipt_and_provenance_reclassification FULL review if shadow evidence is promoted toward canonical receipt truth
distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if any work implies authority movement or cutover legality beyond the frozen scope
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if any work implies trust-root promotion rotation revocation execution or publication execution
stop_conditions: stop if local logs traces mirrors or CI outputs are reframed as canonical receipts
stop if Ζ-B3 drifts into live trust revocation or publication execution
stop if Ζ-B3 reinterprets rehearsal or verification doctrine as authority-transfer proof
notes: This prompt is the only later-wave family currently admitted, and only with cautions.
Outputs must remain inside a shadow or parallel evidence posture rather than claim live receipt-pipeline realization.

prompt_order.title: POST_RECEIPT_PIPELINE_ANCHORIZATION_REASSESSMENT-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify the admitted family stayed inside a shadow or parallel evidence posture
checkpoint must verify no first-wave family widened and no trust-sensitive later-wave family was smuggled in
stop_conditions: stop before any second later-wave family prompt until this checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether any follow-on later-wave reconsideration is honest after Ζ-B3.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-B3 next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
